title: What Is AI Class Checklist
description: Teacher-only class-level checklist for the Grade 1 What Is AI lesson.
criteria_json: {"criteria":[{"key":"objective_met","label":"Students described AI as a computer helper made by people."},{"key":"activity_completed","label":"Class sorted examples into people helpers; ordinary tools; and AI helpers."},{"key":"students_explained_thinking","label":"Students used because language to explain at least one sorting choice."},{"key":"misconception_check","label":"Students were reminded that AI is not a person and may make mistakes."}]}
